name: Clever Corn Bake
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces frozen sweet corn, thawed and drained (about 3 cups)
4 ounces Kraft Natural Sharp Cheddar Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dressing, egg yolks, flour, sugar, and pepper until smooth.
2. Stir in corn, cheese, and onions.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; fold into corn mixture.
4. Pour batter into a greased 4-cup souffle dish or 9-inch square baking dish.
5. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
